description: A pair of round-toed purple casual shoes with grey and white accents, central lace-ups and low-top stylingCanvas upper with stitched and printed details, has overlays, eyelet detail on the midfoot region and a reinforced heel collarSoft tongue and inner, branding on the tongueCushioned and textured footbed with branding on the heelThick midsole with foxing on the forefoot and branding on the backfootTextured outsole with patterned grooves and brandingWarranty: 3 months for manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
